title: Entity Fire At Target Behavior
description: Allows an entity to attack by firing a shot with a delay. Anchor and offset parameters of this component overrides the anchor and offset from projectile component.

attack_cooldown.title: Attack Cooldown
attack_cooldown.description:
The cooldown time in seconds before this goal can be used again.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.5

attack_range.title: Attack Range
attack_range.description:
Target needs to be within this range for the attack to happen.

Sample values:
• breeze: [0,16]

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

Sample values:
• breeze: {"all_of":[{"test":"is_navigating","value":fals...

max_head_rotation_x.title: Max Head Rotation X
max_head_rotation_x.description: Maximum head rotation (in degrees), on the X-axis, that this entity can apply while trying to look at the target.

max_head_rotation_y.title: Max Head Rotation Y
max_head_rotation_y.description: Maximum head rotation (in degrees), on the Y-axis, that this entity can apply while trying to look at the target.

owner_anchor.title: Owner Anchor
owner_anchor.description:
Entity anchor for the projectile spawn location.

Sample values:
• breeze: 2

defaultSnippets.label: Owner Offset (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Owner Offset as an object

owner_offset.title: Owner Offset
owner_offset.description:
Offset vector from the owner_anchor.

Sample values:
• breeze: [0,0.3,0]

defaultSnippets.label: Owner Offset (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Owner Offset as an object

post_shoot_delay.title: Post Shoot Delay
post_shoot_delay.description:
Time in seconds between firing the projectile and ending the goal.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.2

pre_shoot_delay.title: Pre Shoot Delay
pre_shoot_delay.description:
Time in seconds before firing the projectile.

Sample values:
• breeze: 0.75

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• breeze: 2

projectile_def.title: Projectile Def
projectile_def.description:
Actor definition to use as projectile for the ranged attack. The actor must be a projectile. This field is required for the goal to be usable.

Sample values:
• breeze: minecraft:breeze_wind_charge_projectile

ranged_fov.title: Ranged Fov
ranged_fov.description:
Field of view (in degrees) when using sensing to detect a target for attack.

Sample values:
• breeze: 90

defaultSnippets.label: Target Offset (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Target Offset as an object

target_offset.title: Target Offset
target_offset.description:
Offset vector from the target_anchor.

Sample values:
• breeze: [0,0.5,0]

defaultSnippets.label: Target Offset (object)
defaultSnippets.description: Use Target Offset as an object
